intentSynonyms: look up portfolio events in fidelity
fetch a single portfolio events in fidelity
view one specific portfolio events in fidelity
view portfolio earnings, dividends, and milestones in fidelity
description: Get upcoming and past portfolio events including earnings reports, ex-dividend dates, and 52-week highs/lows for positions in your portfolio.

direction.description: Look at future or past events (default: future)

symbols.description: Specific symbols to check. If omitted, uses top portfolio holdings.
